rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding data, correcting a critical misinterpretation of the Pearson correlation and ensuring alignment between evidence and claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked uncertainty for each recommendation, adding confidence intervals and discussing caveats about metric limitations and potential confounders.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift, focusing solely on the specified aspects of the section.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified and corrected harmful errors in interpretation and recommendations, preventing downstream harm with no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with sources and reasons, ensuring full traceability.
